data.title: Pakistan's Foreign Ministry: The date for the next round of US-Iran talks has not yet been set.
data.description: Pakistan's Foreign Ministry: The date for the next round of US-Iran talks has not yet been set. (Jinshi)

data.title: Pakistan Foreign Ministry Awaits Date for Next U.S.-Iran Talks
data.description: Pakistan's Foreign Ministry has announced that the date for the next round of talks between the United States and Iran has not yet been determined. According to Odaily, the ministry is awaiting further information regarding the scheduling of these discussions. The talks are part of ongoing diplomatic efforts to address issues between the two nations.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Bailey: No Rush to Raise Interest Rates
data.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has stated that the central bank will not hastily decide to increase interest rates. According to Jin10, Bailey emphasized the importance of carefully assessing economic conditions before making any changes to the current monetary policy. He highlighted the need for a balanced approach to ensure that any decision aligns with the broader economic objectives. Bailey's comments come amid ongoing discussions about the future direction of interest rates in response to economic developments.

data.title: Errol Musk Reveals Elon and Kimbal Musk's Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Errol Musk disclosed that his sons, Elon Musk and Kimbal Musk, collectively possess approximately $1.6 billion in Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Errol Musk mentioned that while he does not personally own any cryptocurrency, he has accepted Bitcoin payments and considers digital currencies beneficial for cross-border transactions.

data.title: Nvidia CEO Discusses Investment Strategy on Podcast
data.description:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently shared insights on the company's investment strategy during the Dwarkesh podcast. According to ChainCatcher, Huang explained that Nvidia prefers to invest broadly across numerous technology companies rather than selecting a few winners. He cited two reasons for this approach: predicting winners is not Nvidia's responsibility, and the company's own history serves as a lesson.

Huang highlighted that when Nvidia was founded, there were 60 companies in the 3D graphics industry, and Nvidia might have been considered an underdog at the time. Today, Nvidia is the highest-valued company globally and has made significant investments in AI ecosystems, biotechnology, robotics, and autonomous driving. The company holds shares in publicly traded companies such as CoreWeave, Intel, Synopsys, and Nokia.

In the field of large language models, Nvidia committed up to $10 billion to Anthropic last November and announced a $30 billion investment in OpenAI this February. Huang mentioned in a March meeting that these might be Nvidia's final investment rounds in these companies as they are preparing to go public.

data.title: Tether purchased 951.35 BTC from Bitfinex, worth $70.47 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Tether purchased 951.35 BTC (worth $70.47 million) from Bitfinex. They now hold 97,204 BTC (worth $7.28 billion).

data.title: Circle Identifies Potential in Yuan-Based Stablecoin
data.description: Circle has identified a significant opportunity in developing a stablecoin pegged to the Chinese yuan. According to NS3.AI, the company believes that a yuan-based stablecoin could cater to the growing demand for digital currencies in the Chinese market. This move aligns with Circle's strategy to expand its presence in the global cryptocurrency landscape by tapping into the potential of the world's second-largest economy. The introduction of a yuan-backed stablecoin could facilitate cross-border transactions and enhance financial inclusion in the region.

data.title: PANews Enhances Agents Toolkit with New Features
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) about the upgrade of its Agents Toolkit, introducing new features including the Polymarket smart money leaderboard. The updated version now covers 16 core usage scenarios and includes 18 CLI commands, expanding its capabilities beyond news retrieval to encompass prediction markets, industry events, and community topics. Key highlights of the upgrade include the Polymarket smart money leaderboard, event and calendar integration, full platform native support, and multilingual output.

data.title: Significant HYPE Tokens Transferred and Staked on Luganodes
data.description: On April 16, two wallet addresses transferred a total of 1.366 million HYPE tokens from HyperEVM to HyperCore, according to BlockBeats. The tokens, valued at approximately $62 million, were fully staked on the USDT0 x Luganodes validation node.

data.title: Global Cybercrime Losses Reach Record $20.8 Billion
data.description: Global cybercrime losses have surged to a historic high of $20.8 billion. According to PANews, investment scams and cryptocurrency-related crimes are the most prevalent contributors to this alarming figure. The rise in these types of crimes highlights the growing challenges in combating cyber threats worldwide.

data.title: TotalEnergies Projects Strong First Quarter Amid Rising Energy Prices
data.description: TotalEnergies is anticipating a robust performance in the first quarter, driven by a surge in energy prices. Bloomberg posted on X that the company expects these gains to counterbalance the adverse effects of the ongoing conflict in Iran. The rise in energy prices has provided a significant boost to TotalEnergies' financial outlook, despite the geopolitical tensions impacting the region. The company remains optimistic about its ability to navigate these challenges and maintain its growth trajectory.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Engages with Samsung for HBM4 Memory to Advance Titan Chip Strategy
data.description: OpenAI is reportedly in discussions with South Korea's Samsung to acquire HBM4 memory, a move aimed at advancing its Titan chip strategy. According to Jin10, this collaboration could enhance OpenAI's capabilities in developing more efficient and powerful AI technologies. The partnership with Samsung, a leader in memory technology, is expected to provide OpenAI with the necessary resources to support its ambitious plans for the Titan chip. This development highlights the growing importance of high-performance memory in the AI industry, as companies seek to optimize their hardware for advanced AI applications.

data.title: Brevis CEO to Participate in Hong Kong Forum on Crypto and Smart Economy
data.description:
Brevis co-founder and CEO Michael will attend the 'Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy' forum in Hong Kong on April 19. According to ChainCatcher, the event is organized by ChainCatcher and RootData as part of the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival.

Brevis is a Web3 platform focused on zero-knowledge verifiable computing, enabling applications to perform complex computations off-chain while providing reliable proofs on-chain. Its core components include Pico zkVM, ZK data coprocessor, real-time block proof Pico Prism, and decentralized proof market ProverNet, which have generated billions of proofs for over 40 protocols across six major blockchains.

The forum will explore the integration of AI technology with crypto networks, discussing topics such as AI Agent economy, smart payments, RWA, and crypto infrastructure. It aims to provide insights into the current state of the industry and offer forward-thinking perspectives on the future of smart economic systems.

data.title: A whale increased its ETH holdings to 6,886 through revolving lending.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 3,500 ETH (worth $8.26 million) into Aave V3, borrowed 8 million USDC, bought 3,386 ETH at $2,363, and then deposited it back into Aave V3. This whale currently holds 6,886 ETH, worth $16.22 million.

data.title: Cato Institute Advocates for Removal of Capital Gains Tax on Cryptocurrencies
data.description:
The Cato Institute, a prominent U.S. think tank, has called for the elimination of capital gains taxes on Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies to foster greater currency competition. According to Cointelegraph, Nicholas Anthony, a policy scholar and research fellow at the Cato Institute, highlighted in a recent report that capital gains tax (CGT) discourages the use of alternative currencies like Bitcoin (BTC) by incentivizing long-term holding and imposing additional reporting burdens.

Anthony proposed that the most straightforward solution would be to abolish capital gains taxes entirely. Alternatively, he suggested removing them specifically for crypto and foreign currency transactions to allow market forces to determine the most effective currency. He noted the challenges faced by Bitcoin users during tax season, emphasizing that while using Bitcoin as money has become easier, the tax code imposes significant burdens on law-abiding citizens. Simple transactions, such as buying a daily cup of coffee with Bitcoin, can result in extensive tax filings.

The Cato Institute, known for its influence on public policy through research and reports, has previously advocated for cryptocurrency before lawmakers. Anthony illustrated the complexity of current tax regulations by comparing every Bitcoin transaction to filling out a tax form, noting that spending Bitcoin can lead to extensive tax documentation. He argued that removing CGT for purchases of goods or services could be a viable solution, though it might create compliance challenges if individuals are required to prove transactions. He also mentioned the possibility of a de minimis tax, where CGT is not triggered unless a specific threshold is met.

Anthony emphasized the need for Congress to simplify the tax code, allowing average Americans to fulfill their obligations with ease. Simplifying the tax process would alleviate stress during tax season and contribute to a more competitive economy. A 2025 survey by the National Cryptocurrency Association revealed that 39% of U.S. crypto holders have used cryptocurrencies to purchase goods and services. Additionally, Springer Nature, an academic publishing company, identified approximately 11,000 merchants worldwide that currently accept Bitcoin as payment, according to BTC Map data.

data.title: Possibly due to the difficulty of Warsh gaining Senate confirmation, Polymarket estimates the probability of Powell stepping down as Fed chair after his term expires to be only 2%.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, although Jerome Powell's term as Fed chairman ends on May 15, Polymarket estimates the probability of him stepping down as chairman after his term expires (May 14). Powell is expected to continue serving as interim chairman. The key to whether Powell can continue as Fed chairman after his term expires lies in whether Trump's chosen successor, Kevin Warsh, can be confirmed by Congress at his Senate Banking Committee hearing on April 21. Powell previously stated that if a successor is not confirmed before May, he will serve as interim chairman. Therefore, the market is indirectly betting that Warsh will struggle to gain congressional approval before April 21 or even May 15, because North Carolina Republican Senator Thom Tillis is blocking the appointment, stating that he will not proceed with any Fed nominee until the Justice Department terminates its investigation into Powell. Odaily Seer continues to monitor and predict the market, seeing changes before they are priced in.

data.title: MGBX will launch spot trading of Sentio (ST).
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will list Sentio (ST) spot trading on April 18, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Deposits will open on April 16, 2026 at 16:00 (SGT), trading will open on April 16, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT), and withdrawals will open on April 18, 2026 at 19:00 (SGT). Sentio is a decentralized data and computing network built specifically for crypto developers. It provides a modern development toolchain, including the Sentio Processor (managed subgraph) supporting native TypeScript, multi-language SDKs, decentralized computing infrastructure, and high-performance data indexing and analysis.

data.title: Circle Commends KRWQ Stablecoin Integration with USDC
data.description: Circle has expressed approval for KRWQ, a won-pegged stablecoin developed through a collaboration between IQ and Frax Finance. According to NS3.AI, Circle highlighted the integration of KRWQ with USDC, noting its potential to tackle inefficiencies in the offshore Korean won non-deliverable forward market. The initiative aims to establish a more transparent on-chain foreign exchange framework.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF Surpasses WisdomTree in Net Inflows
data.description: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF has achieved a significant milestone, reaching $103 million in total net inflows. According to NS3.AI, this development places it ahead of WisdomTree's ETF, which has garnered $86 million in net inflows. On April 15, Morgan Stanley's ETF added $19.3 million in net inflows, marking a notable achievement just one week after its launch.

data.title: Gulf States Utilize Malaysia as Channel to Iran, Says Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim
data.description: Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has revealed that leaders from Gulf states have been using Malaysia as a conduit to engage with Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Anwar's statement about the diplomatic role Malaysia plays in facilitating communication between these regions. This development underscores Malaysia's strategic position in fostering dialogue and cooperation in the Middle East. Anwar's comments reflect the ongoing geopolitical dynamics and the importance of diplomatic channels in addressing regional issues.
